gherkin:
Given a user is logged in to mlb.com/tv
And the user initiated playback of VOD/SVOD/FLIVE/SLIVE content from the Welcome Center (/tv)
Or the user initiated playback of VOD/SVOD/FLIVE/SLIVE content from the Shows Page (/tv/shows)
And the user has the appropriate entitlements for their selected content (none for VOD or FLIVE, SUBSCRIBERVOD for SVOD or SLIVE)
When the user initiates any of the following actions:
Pause
Play
Fast Forward
Rewind
Volume Control
Closed Caption
Full Screen
Then the player should respond appropriately to each action
